user.title: Connect to Poolex Silverline
user.description: Enter the heat pump's local network details and Tuya credentials. The device must be on the same network as Home Assistant; the Smart Life app should not be connected at the same time.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the heat pump on the LAN.
data_description.device_id: Tuya device ID (22 hex characters), found in the Smart Life developer console or via tinytuya scan.
data_description.local_key: 16-character device-specific encryption key from the Tuya cloud.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Poolex Silverline
reauth_confirm.description: The device rejected the stored local key. Enter the current key.

data_description.local_key: 16-character device-specific key. Reissued whenever the device is re-paired in Smart Life.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Poolex Silverline
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for this heat pump.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the heat pump on the LAN.
data_description.device_id: Must match the device that was originally added.

discovery_confirm.title: Add discovered Poolex Silverline
discovery_confirm.description: A heat pump was discovered at {host}. Enter its local key to finish setup.

data_description.local_key: 16-character device-specific encryption key from the Tuya cloud console.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the heat pump.
error.invalid_auth: The local key was rejected by the device.

abort.device_id_mismatch: The supplied device ID does not match the original device.

auth_failed.message: The heat pump rejected the credentials. Re-authentication is required.

set_failed.message: Failed to update the heat pump: {reason}

preset_not_available_in_auto.message: Boost and silent presets are not available while the heat pump is in auto mode.
